sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The player is now above the blue square at (25.5, 45.5). Looking at the image, the player (green) is above the top-right blue square's frame. I need to get directly below the blue square to collect it with SPACE. Let me check positions and move DOWN.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'b', 'W', 'c', 'G']:
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b))
        print(f"  id={n['id']} ({n['color']}): center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Player should be above the blue square. Need to go DOWN to get below it.
# Blue square at (25.5, 45.5), player needs to be at row > 29 (below the frame)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
